title: Fictional Tech Founder Transparent Cutout Meme Asset AI
sourceTitle: Fictional Tech Founder Transparent Cutout Meme Asset AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional tech founder in black hoodie riding an oversized plush mascot in a playful surreal pose. Scene / Context: transparent-background sticker-style cutout with clean edges and soft studio shadow. Source Recipe Translation: fictional tech founder transparent cutout meme asset. Preserve these source mechanics: playful surreal editorial cutout, clean transparent-background product-sticker feel, high-detail realistic lighting. Concrete social variant uses fictional tech founder in black hoodie riding an oversized plush mascot in a playful surreal pose in transparent-background sticker-style cutout with clean edges and soft studio shadow. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: playful surreal editorial cutout, clean transparent-background product-sticker feel, high-detail realistic lighting; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
